form.formComment: Resumes from a spell after only one run when got back early 7th of 9 at this track Mdn-Sw on December 24 over 1100m, on a slow track; 6 len behind Andi Don't Care with 58.5kg at $41. Sure to have improved over the break and keep onside.

form.formComment: Resumes racing after a long spell. Only one run when 5th of 9 at Beaudesert Mdn on April 25 over 1100m, in the wet; 9 len behind Nirvana The Storm carrying 59kg at $21. Better off following this run.

form.formComment: Resumes from a spell. Finished off last campaign second last of 9 at Toowoomba Mdn November 23 2024 over 870m, soft track; 9 len behind Jerobi with 58.5kg at $151. form.formComment: Facing the starter for the first time. Three-year-old filly by Heroic Valour out of Solo Command purchased for AUD $ 5,000 (Magic Millions 2024 Capricornia Yearling Sale). At the most recent trial finished fourth on December 30 at Warwick over 800m. A betting watch.

form.formComment: At debut, from last on the turn 5th of 9 at this track Mdn-Sw on March 14 over 800m, 2.25 len behind Deep Kharma carrying 56kg at $8. Has the ability and will prove very hard to beat.

form.formComment: Returns from a 33-day let-up. Last start second last of 9 at this track Mdn-Sw on March 14 over 800m, 4 len behind Deep Kharma with 56.5kg at $61. The run before that 2nd in a small field at Gatton Mdn-Sw on March 1 over 860m, on a slow track; 0.7 len behind Sure Start carrying 56.5kg at $17. This looks a suitable assignment.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Raced greenly under pressure in the home straight.

form.formComment: Raced twice to date. When well in the market at debut, 2nd in a small field at Sunshine Coast Poly Mdn-Sw on March 8 over 1000m, 1.75 len behind Ralos Star carrying 55.5kg at $3.60. Last start second last of 13 at Sunshine Coast Mdn on March 29 over 1000m, on a slow track; 9 len behind Naturally Lit carrying 57kg at $11. Has ability and a form reversal is on the cards.

form.formComment: Most recently ran last of 9 at Gatton Mdn on April 10 over 1100m, 16 len behind Kirksville with 57kg at $151. Before that ran last of 8 at Townsville Mdn on March 15 over 1000m, slow going 11 len behind Parppy 'N' Me carrying 55.5kg at $101. Needs to improve sharply.

form.formComment: Resuming after five months in the paddock. Finished off last campaign when last of 8 at this track 4yo+ Mdn-Sw November 20 over 800m, 7 len behind Betta Being Single with 53kg at $71. Previously first up; second last of 9 at Port Macquarie Mdn-Sw August 23 over 1106m, on heavy track; 6 len behind Mystic Way carrying 57kg at $41. The betting will be key.
